name: 6"x 15" Natural Rectangular Drawer Organizer Brown - Brightroom™: Kitchen Utensil & Silverware Storage, Stain-Resistant
description:
The Bamboo Rectangular Drawer Organizer from Brightroom™ keeps your cutlery organized and easily accessible. Made with varnished finish bamboo, this rectangular drawer organizer features a spacious main compartment to easily store knives, spoons, forks and other kitchen utensils. The beautiful drawer organizer can also be placed on a shelf or countertop, and it fits in beautifully with any decor style. Great for the kitchen or anywhere else you need an attractive storage solution, it can be spot cleaned or wiped clean for easy upkeep.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
